desc: Audit curated t6040-bringup vs main src/ for drift, then shape the T6040 m1n1 upstream series (dapf gate, M4 watchdog arm, MCC t6041, cpufreq t6040, PCIe t6040 + Apple-ordered clock gating, kboot t6040 display, pmgr_adt2dt fixes, log-ring guard from ticket 042) with a cover-letter draft; draft only, CJ posts (ROADMAP Upstreaming pending; AGENTS.md m1n1-clean worktree)
author: fable
